symbols.name: TransactionApplier
symbols.docstring:
Applies a planned transaction to the filesystem.

    Execution strategy:
    1. Load the transaction (header + edits)
    2. Verify all file hashes (conflict detection)
    3. Group edits by file
    4. For each file: write modified content to a temp file
    5. Swap all temp files to real locations (atomic per-file)
    6. Re-index affected files
    7. Clean up: remove transaction file and temps

symbols.name: apply
symbols.docstring: Apply a transaction. Returns a result dict for JSON output.

symbols.name: _verify_hashes
symbols.docstring: Verify all file hashes match what was recorded at plan time.

symbols.name: _apply_edits_to_content
symbols.docstring:
Apply edits to file content, bottom-to-top.

        Sorts edits by start offset descending so that applying
        one edit does not shift the byte offsets of subsequent edits.

symbols.name: _rollback
symbols.docstring: Restore files that were already swapped.

symbols.name: _cleanup_temps
symbols.docstring: Remove any temp files that were not swapped.

symbols.name: _reindex_files
symbols.docstring: Re-index affected files after rename is applied.
